item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nick cave everybody
must be a lot to take in
yo quiero taco bell
disgusting
cool fact
i guess
we've all been there
what kinda fish is on the left?
every single one
this was me a long time ago
you can call me ray, or you can call me jay..
impressive
as your lawyer i advise you to not do this
looks like face drugs
such a great action movie
alright that's weird
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: That ended on a surprisingly wholesome note

item.title: Do Not Comply
item.description:
Non-compliant.com
Look up Task Force Butler
Non-compliant.com
Non-compliant.com
Non-compliant.com
Fp edit: hey folks, thanks to the current administration I am a houseless veteran. If you want to learn more and could possibly help me follow the link tree below to the GoFundMe and other places you can find my content https://linktr.ee/GridSquares Folks at this juncture everybody has to do their part. You either stand up against authoritarian or get walked over by it
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.description:
*gay noises*
(pew)
me at night
wise
:3
peep
omnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnomnom
Pay me enough at http://onlyfans.abbii.gay and you might receive some ;)
SLURP
My little pony, Friendship is Witchcraft. Also some of you will have the following thing stuck in your head: "Since we're not related it'll be Okay"
A FEMBOY?
oh no
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: The last time I posted about my dad in the hospital was in 2020 and I was effing traumatized. This time was 100% different thankfully.
item.description: People shit on how slow our health care system can be but when it’s a real, real, REAL emergency they get the job done. I am so incredibly thankful.
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: Get you a girl who...
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: Body
item.description: You scroll past these comics to escape stress, but on the other side, creators are drowning in it. Platforms profit from our work, but we see none of it. Patreon is the difference between creating out of love and creating out of desperation. If you’ve ever laughed, smiled, or felt less alone because of our comics, know this: your support means the world. Thank you for being part of the story. PS: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Paris pollution over the years
item.description: as a french i heard a lot of people especially parisians complaigning about 'perpetual' road works into the capital. and Hidalgo (paris mayor) 'slaughtering' their town. apparently, if i believe that image she would have done a pretty good job

item.title: Help me, Imgur. Tiny octopus is trapped.
item.description: It's been an hour. Have to pee. Hungry. Everything is going dark... Is this how it ends? It's been a good life.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus
